reviews.comment:
Una estación fantasma. Los empleados amables.. Los baños hediondos...no hay un estacionamiento qué tenga techo o sombra...te calcinas si estas mas de 10 minutos afuera..pase hace 8 dias y terrible el calor y nada de sombra

(Translated by Google)
A ghost station. The employees are friendly. The bathrooms stink. There's no parking lot with a roof or shade. You'll burn up if you're outside for more than 10 minutes. I was there 8 days ago and the heat was terrible, and there was no shade.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Basic, just fuel.
Poor service.
No air pump.
Dirty bathrooms, not very hygienic, just soap and paper towels...
Convenience store is terrible.

(Original)
Básica, só combustível.
atendimento ruim
Não tem bomba de ar.
Banheiros sujos pouco higiênico, sim sabonete papel toalha...
loja de conveniência não presta.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WaVpERlpkQzFqUkRKU1kxOWtkMjVuTlU1U1NGRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un solo playero. Demoramos casi 1 hora para cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
There was only one gas station attendant. It took us almost an hour to fill up with gas.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Ana. Lamentamos que no pudiéramos satisfacer sus necesidades de rapidez en la atencion. La playa de combustible es atendida por dos colaboradores mas un colaborador que mantiende los baños limpios. Contamos con una isla y un puesto de facturacion. Las demoras estan dadas por los medios de pago elegidos por los clientes, no depende de los colaboradores que atienden si un cliente demora en realizar el pago, por ej. Mediante QR. Ademas, tenemos disponible una red de wifi Starlink para el uso de todas las personas que nos visitan. Paciencia y entendimiento son virtudes que pocos seres pueden manejar. Saludos cordiales.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT214NWJUaDVWM1JGV0VSaFFXdHBRVlpzT0hreFFWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Sirve para cargar combustible si vas a la difunta correa por qué no hay nada cerca después

(Translated by Google)
It's useful for refueling if you're going to the defunct beltway because there's nothing nearby afterwards
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xvNWFVNUtObE4zTm5KSVZXZEtiR2xuYW1odmRsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza los baños.. hace tiempo no ingreso a un lugar tan descuidado y sucio.. cuando reclame el playero me indicó que él es el encargado de cargar nafta y limpiar baños.. que no son capaces de contratar a alguien para limpieza— un verdadero asco

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are a disgrace. I haven't been to such a neglected and dirty place in ages. When I complained, the attendant told me he's in charge of pumping gas and cleaning the bathrooms, and that they can't afford to hire someone for cleaning—it's disgusting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xnMlZFeG9ZM2RYWmtKa00yeG1UVkZYYVVJdGVXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Baños sin agua, suciedad extrema
En el servicompras, pésima la atención,  escasa variedad de productos.  La experiencia como bienvenida a San Juan pésima. Una lástima.

(Translated by Google)
Bathrooms without water, extremely dirty. The service at the convenience store was terrible, and the product selection was limited. The overall experience as a welcome to San Juan was awful. A real shame.
